scriptLines:
query: 'SELECT
    CAST(REPLACE(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), fecha_limpia, 112), '-', '') AS INT) AS fecha_key,
    fecha_limpia                                AS fecha,
    CAST(DATEPART(WEEKDAY, fecha_limpia) AS TINYINT)    AS dia_semana,
    DATENAME(WEEKDAY, fecha_limpia)             AS nombre_dia,
    CAST(DAY(fecha_limpia) AS TINYINT)          AS dia_mes,
    CAST(MONTH(fecha_limpia) AS TINYINT)        AS mes,
    DATENAME(MONTH, fecha_limpia)               AS nombre_mes,
    CAST(DATEPART(QUARTER, fecha_limpia) AS TINYINT)    AS trimestre,
    CAST(YEAR(fecha_limpia) AS SMALLINT)        AS anio,
    CAST(
        CASE
            WHEN DATEPART(WEEKDAY, fecha_limpia) IN (6,7) THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END
    AS BIT)                                     AS es_fin_semana
FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        TRY_CAST(fecha_vacunacion AS DATE) AS fecha_limpia
    FROM silver.vacunaciones_consolidadas
    WHERE fecha_vacunacion IS NOT NULL
) sub
WHERE fecha_limpia IS NOT NULL',
